headline: TechnipFMC Wins iEPCI Contract From Var Energi in the North Sea
summary: FTI lands a $500M-$1B North Sea iEPCI contract from Var Energi, boosting backlog and reinforcing its integrated subsea growth strategy.

raw.headline: TechnipFMC Wins iEPCI Contract From Var Energi in the North Sea
raw.summary: FTI lands a $500M-$1B North Sea iEPCI contract from Var Energi, boosting backlog and reinforcing its integrated subsea growth strategy.

headline: Refiner Margins Surge as Oil & Gas Sector Diverges: VLO, MPC, PSX Lead
summary: Downstream refiners like Valero, Marathon, and Phillips 66 are outperforming the struggling oil & gas sector, driven by surging margins and explosive earnings growth.

raw.headline: Refiner Margins Surge as Oil & Gas Sector Diverges: VLO, MPC, PSX Lead
